name: Wand of Mental Purification (7th-rank)
description:
Red feathers hang from the handle of this ivory wand. Holding it brings a sense of gentle calm.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast 7th-rank , and can attempt to counteract one mental effect on the same target. Treat the spell's rank as 1 higher for this counteract check.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of soothe of the appropriate rank.
